SprintRecord.title: SprintRecord
SprintRecord.description: A student study sprint performance record

userId.description: Firebase Auth UID of the student

notesTopic.description: Topic or title of the study notes

scorePoints.description: Number of correct answers on the quiz

totalMetricsCount.description: Total number of questions in the quiz

accuracyPercentage.description: Percentage accuracy of the quiz score

rawWorkspacePayload.description: Full study sprint payload containing flashcards, mnemonics, and quiz questions with user responses

loggedTimestamp.description: Firestore server timestamp of when the record was logged

student_performance_records/{recordId}.description: Collection of student study sprint history logs
